ddls:
CREATE TABLE "websites" (
  "website_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each website */,
  "domain" TEXT /* Domain name of the website */,
  "url" TEXT /* Full URL of the website */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the website was created */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date the website was last modified */,
  "last_scanned" TEXT /* Date the website was last scanned */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the website (e.g., benign, suspicious, phishing) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the website is active or not */,
  "is_phishing" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the website is classified as phishing or not */,
  "phishing_probability" REAL /* Probability of the website being phishing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "website_ip_addresses" (
  "ip_address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each IP address */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated website */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address associated with the website */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the IP address was created */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date the IP address was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ip_address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "website_certificates" (
  "certificate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certificate */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated website */,
  "issuer" TEXT /* Issuer of the certificate */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the certificate */,
  "valid_from" TEXT /* Date the certificate is valid from */,
  "valid_to" TEXT /* Date the certificate is valid to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certificate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "website_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated website */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the tag was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "website_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated website */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the category was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated machine learning model */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the model version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the model version was created */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model version */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model version */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_notification_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated user */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., phishing, malware) */,
  "notification_channel" TEXT /* Notification channel (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of notifications (e.g., immediate, daily) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date the configuration was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine learning model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., SVM, Random Forest) */,
  "training_data" TEXT /* Training data used for the model */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date the model was trained */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., active, retired) */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the model */,
  "model_parameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters and other configuration details of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)
